title: Ray Dalio: Long Island University Commencement Speech
body:
1. "Encounters with Reality" = learning from pain. "Pain + Reflection = Progress"
2. "Remember that you were born with a certain nature. And you are on your way to understand it and find what suits you. Knowing your nature is always critically important to helping your understand what success is for you."
3. "Success = Having meaningful work + meaningful relationships. In other words, work and relationships you are thrilled by. If you can make work and your passion one and the same, and you can do it with people who you care about, and who care about you, you will have a happy, successful life"
4. "When life doesn't give you what you want, you can be angry or sad for yourself or you can learn about how reality works and develop principles that will work well to get you what you want."
"Own your life and take responsibility to make it great. Think about how reality works. Be radically open minded to hear how you can be better, and make the moves to improve yourself and make a great life for yourself."
5. "You will have to work damn hard if you want to be really successful. Excellence is worth it."
author: @RobinOm27

title: Ray Dalio: Long Island University Commencement Speech
body: Your message is a reminder that growth comes more from humility and reflection than certainty. “Pain + Reflection = Progress” is timeless advice for any generation.
author: @sistemasolidariooficial

title: Ray Dalio: Long Island University Commencement Speech
body:
Good morning Dr. Ray.
I am from Sydney Australia.
Thank you so much for your encouragement and sharing your wisdom.
I hope one day I can meet you in person. God Bless.
author: @thebestisyettobe5506

title: Ray Dalio: Long Island University Commencement Speech
body:
"Everything is another one of those"

Dalio's pattern-recognition framework for life. Instead of treating each challenge as unprecedented, he learned to classify nearly every situation as a recurring type that humanity has faced
before. This shift from novelty to taxonomy turns life from a series of surprises into a puzzle catalog with known solutions. It's the mental model that bridges his investing career
(where historical patterns predict markets) to personal life (where historical patterns predict human experience).
author: @TheMaxmax00009

title: Ray Dalio: Long Island University Commencement Speech
body: I love it! Thank you -- sometimes a fresh graduate may not understand what you mean, but when they have some work experiences and life experiences, watching this video would be highly relatable. Thank you Ray!
author: @chemfunman

title: Ray Dalio: Long Island University Commencement Speech
body: Thank you Ray. I am a big fan of you and your work. Your honesty, humility and generosity to always share not just your commercial success and expertise but also grounded wisdom and philosophy is exemplary and much needed in our society. Thank you for being the light for many of us. I've had the great honour of meeting you in person before and value even today what you shared about your Principles. This commencement speech is a great reminder for me to revisit that book again. Thank you from bottom of my heart.
author: @designingmylife

title: Ray Dalio: Long Island University Commencement Speech
body: Dear Dr. Ray, I loved every bit of your wisdom. You are a true inspiration for people regardless of age or nationality. Thank you !

title: Ray Dalio: Long Island University Commencement Speech
body: Very insightful ! Most of the time, it easy to default to the thinking that as a smart person, decision is only for that person. But saying, hire smarter persons who will stress test the idea is very valuable. It takes lot of humility to come to that point.

title: Ray Dalio: Long Island University Commencement Speech

title: Ray Dalio: Long Island University Commencement Speech
body: It's so cool that you gifted meditation and your book. I wish more leaders who practice and value meditation shared it forward like this more. God knows we need more meditators in a world where there's so much swirling around fighting for people's attention. I also really valued your life lessons shared. thank you.
author: @michlnyc

title: Ray Dalio: Long Island University Commencement Speech
body: thank you so much Ray, your teachings are among the most precious I've ever received; your book is practically sacred to me. I've reread it several times and feel the need to read it again, to teach the principles and how to create them to my future children.
author: @christopheramorevole149

title: Ray Dalio: Long Island University Commencement Speech
body: One of the best speeches I've ever heard so far in life! So much wisdom about how to deal with the Paths of Life, which will be a gem to bring along on each listeners life journey, given they will heed the messages. Ray Dalio is a unique combination of a truly humble, reflecting, yet very successful business man and human being  I'm delighted I found this speech among the endless stream of utter nonsense.
